---
name: New Provider Support
about: Request support for a new AI provider
title: "[Provider] "
labels: provider
---

**Provider name**
e.g., Replicate, Perplexity, DeepSeek

**API base URL**
e.g., `https://api.replicate.com`

**Response format**
Is it OpenAI-compatible? Does it use a custom format?

**Priority**
How many people would benefit? Link to usage stats if available.
